notes_md:
**tối ngày** means *all day long* or *all the time*, often with a slightly annoyed tone. It usually implies something happens too much.

It’s an adverb phrase, placed after the verb to show frequency.  

Often used when complaining about repeated actions or habits.  
Close synonym: **suốt ngày**, **cả ngày** (very similar meaning, but *tối ngày* can feel more negative).
exampleSentencesTranslated: He complains about work all the time which makes me tired.
My cat runs around in the living room all the time.
My grandmother likes to talk to the neighbors all the time.
exampleSentences: Anh ấy than phiền về công việc tối ngày khiến em mệt mỏi.
Con mèo nhà chị chạy nhảy tối ngày trong phòng khách.
Bà ngoại em thích nói chuyện với hàng xóm tối ngày.
notes:
tối ngày means all day long or all the time, often with a slightly annoyed tone. It usually implies something happens too much.

It’s an adverb phrase, placed after the verb to show frequency.  

Often used when complaining about repeated actions or habits.  
Close synonym: suốt ngày, cả ngày (very similar meaning, but tối ngày can feel more negative).

definitions.vi: Suốt cả ngày, liên tục, thường mang nghĩa phàn nàn.
definitions.en: All day long; all the time.
definitions.es: Todo el día; todo el tiempo.

example.vi: Anh ấy cứ xem TV tối ngày.
example.en: He watches TV all the time.
example.es: Él mira televisión todo el día.

translation.en: He plays games all day long.

content.sentence: Sao con cứ nghịch ngợm ___ thế?

translation.en: Why are you naughty all the time?
